nodes.label: Database choice v1
nodes.content: Originally chose SQLite for local development only

nodes.label: Database choice v2
nodes.content: Latest decision: PostgreSQL for production and local parity

nodes.label: JWT refresh race
nodes.content: Refresh token rotation has a race condition in the auth middleware

nodes.label: dark mode preference
nodes.content: User strongly prefers dark mode on all interfaces

nodes.label: FastAPI backend choice
nodes.content: Chose FastAPI over Flask because async support is critical

nodes.label: Redis session caching
nodes.content: Redis is used for caching session tokens with TTL support

nodes.label: Neo4j concurrency note
nodes.content: SQLite struggles with concurrent writes, which pushed the team toward Neo4j

nodes.label: GraphQL rejected
nodes.content: Team decided against GraphQL — REST is sufficient and the team lacks GraphQL expertise

nodes.label: Rate limiting per tenant
nodes.content: API rate limiting is implemented per-tenant at 120 requests per minute globally

nodes.label: Kubernetes rollout strategy
nodes.content: Production uses RollingUpdate strategy with a 25% max surge

nodes.label: Embedding model choice
nodes.content: all-MiniLM-L6-v2 chosen for local semantic embeddings, no API key needed

queries.name: database_recent_decision
queries.query: what did we decide recently about the database

queries.name: auth_token_duration
queries.query: how long do auth tokens last

queries.name: theme_preference_paraphrase
queries.query: which interface theme does the user want

queries.name: framework_choice
queries.query: which backend framework did we settle on

queries.name: sqlite_reason
queries.query: why did we stop using sqlite

queries.name: auth_bug_adversarial
queries.query: there's a bug in authentication around token refresh
queries.note: Query mentions neither 'race condition' nor 'rotation' — tests semantic generalization

queries.name: api_throttle_adversarial
queries.query: what is our policy for throttling clients
queries.note: Paraphrase: throttle != rate limit, clients != tenant

queries.name: graphql_history
queries.query: did we ever consider switching away from REST
queries.note: Query is about history of REST, which only connects to the GraphQL rejection node

queries.name: vector_search_implementation
queries.query: how does semantic search work without an API key
queries.note: No overlap with the node label — tests deep semantic resolution

queries.name: deployment_surge
queries.query: what deployment strategy are we using in prod
queries.note: Prod == production, strategy is present but surrounded by other K8s facts

queries.name: db_original_choice_temporal
queries.query: what was the original database before we changed it
queries.note: Requires temporal disambiguation — v1 not v2 — in presence of the newer decision node
